g.text: Verify ESP32-C3 SuperMini clone pinout before routing/order. Firmware default: GPIO20 = MIDI RX 31250, GPIO21 = Cmod TX 115200.

g.desc: Verify ESP32-C3 SuperMini clone pinout before routing/order. Firmware default: GPIO20 = MIDI RX 31250, GPIO21 = Cmod TX 115200.

g.text: MIDI DIN input is isolated. DIN pin 2 is shield/chassis only; do not join it to ESP32/Cmod logic GND on this input side.

g.desc: MIDI DIN input is isolated. DIN pin 2 is shield/chassis only; do not join it to ESP32/Cmod logic GND on this input side.
